spec.name: humantrace_signals
spec.description: Proof-of-clarity signals for HumanTrace fraud detection sessions. Compatible with proof_of_clarity_signals.schema.json.

signals.label: Threat Identified
signals.example_feedback: Synthetic fraud pattern detected with high confidence.
signals.meaning: HumanTrace detected no genuine human reasoning behind this message. The session surfaced a credible synthetic fraud signal.

signals.label: Mixed Content Detected
signals.example_feedback: This message shows signs of human-edited synthetic content.
signals.meaning: HumanTrace detected internally inconsistent reasoning signals — the seam signature of AI scaffolding with human modifications.

signals.label: Human Present
signals.example_feedback: Human reasoning presence detected in this message.
signals.meaning: HumanTrace detected genuine human reasoning signals across multiple layers with sufficient confidence.

signals.label: Judgment Claimed
signals.example_feedback: You completed this session with an owned judgment.
signals.meaning: The user declared their decision and acknowledged that HumanTrace did not decide for them. Responsibility was explicitly claimed.

signals.label: Δ-Insight
signals.example_feedback: Your clarity increased significantly through this scan.
signals.meaning: The scan produced a meaningful increase in the user's clarity — from raw suspicion to a structured signal with confidence score.

signals.label: Uncertainty Surfaced
signals.example_feedback: This message could not be confirmed as human or synthetic. Caution was raised.
signals.meaning: HumanTrace detected insufficient signal to confirm human presence. The user was protected from false confidence.
